task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Chemicals tool in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the URL https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/.

task_completion.description: Add Anhydrous Ammonia, Nitric Acid, and Acetone to the chemical list in CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'My Chemicals' or active chemical list in the CAMEO Chemicals interface shows Anhydrous Ammonia (or UN 1005), Nitric Acid (or UN 2031), and Acetone (or UN 1090).

task_completion.description: Run the reactivity prediction for the selected chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Chemicals Reactivity Worksheet or compatibility matrix is displayed, showing the interactions between the three chemicals.

task_completion.description: Document the pairwise analysis in the hazard assessment report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing warehouse_hazard_assessment.txt. The text includes the hazard analysis for all three pairs (Ammonia + Nitric Acid, Ammonia + Acetone, Nitric Acid + Acetone), mentioning hazardous reactions, predicted products, and specific dangers.

task_completion.description: Include an overall risk summary and storage separation recommendations in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor showing warehouse_hazard_assessment.txt contains sections or paragraphs explicitly providing an overall risk summary and recommendations for separating the chemicals in storage.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Chemicals website in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the CAMEO Chemicals website with the chemicals added, indicating manual or automated UI interaction rather than API/script bypassing.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create and save the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor or terminal editor is visible with the report content, rather than the file being generated entirely via a background script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a single echo or python script to generate the entire text file without using the web tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of a terminal window showing a script or long echo command that writes the entire report content directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The three chemicals are Anhydrous Ammonia (UN 1005), Nitric Acid >70% (UN 2031), and Acetone (UN 1090). There are 3 pairwise combinations. Ammonia + Nitric Acid produces an exothermic reaction forming ammonium nitrate with toxic fume release. Ammonia + Acetone forms acetone imine (volatile/flammable). Nitric Acid + Acetone undergoes a violent exothermic reaction with explosion risks. The CAMEO Chemicals tool (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) is a real NOAA/EPA tool used for this prediction.
